finding: Several residue fixtures still asserted superseded behavior: `done` without governed closeout expected `planning-mirror-only` instead of fail-closed `source-done-governance-incomplete`, and stale-import guidance expected `--force` instead of governed `--reconcile-mirror`.
expectedBehavior: Validator fixtures must be updated with the public residue classification contract whenever fail-closed precedence or recovery commands change; stale assertions should identify the current bucket and safe command.
evidenceOrRepro: Reproduced during TASK-AAO-0170: after the runner and fixture setup passed, the suite failed at the planning-mirror and stale-import assertions until both were aligned with current CLI behavior.
followUp: Fixed 2026-07-14: `suite-impl.ts` residue assertions aligned; focused contract regression `tests/cli/task-ledger-residue-contract.test.ts` pins bucket precedence and recovery templates.
